headline: NX3 Commercial Group Closes $27.5 Million Five-Property NNN Portfolio in Florida 1031 Exchange
summary: New York apartment seller trades multifamily for a diversified portfolio of 7-Eleven, Chipotle, Wawa, Starbucks and multi-tenant retail assets - the latest sign of capital migrating from high-tax states into passive triple net lease property. FORT ...
